name: X-Golf Algonquin
about: X-Golf Algonquin offers indoor golf simulator experiences for all skill levels, featuring state-of-the-art simulators that provide accurate and realistic gameplay. The venue operates under a per-bay, hourly pricing model and includes a full-service bar and restaurant, making it suitable for casual play, dining, and private events. Additional offerings include PGA-certified lessons, leagues, and membership options, catering to both serious golfers and social groups looking for an entertaining activity.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with unparalleled accuracy
Flexible pricing model with BOGO Monday deals and senior discounts
On-site PGA-certified instructors for lessons and skill improvement
Full bar and restaurant amenities for a complete entertainment experience
Support for leagues and tournaments for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with wings, pizza, appetizers, and other shareable bites
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulator with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available, though players are encouraged to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full-service bar and kitchen where food and drinks can be purchased.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes about one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. If you have more than one player, you may want to book an additional hour per player.

faq.question: Is X-Golf Algonquin kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages and is suitable for families.
